name: TARGETPAIRS_FOR_NEW_ENTRANTS_2024
description: Target pairs for new entrants in 2024. Auto-generated from the core-four benchmark and aligned to the validated query-frame Cypher semantics.
cypher:
MATCH (a:Assignee)<-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]-(p0:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y0:Year)
WITH a, min(y0.year) AS first_year
WHERE first_year = $year
MATCH (a)<-[:HAS_ASSIGNEE]-(p:Patent)-[:PUBLISHED_IN]->(y:Year)
WHERE y.year = $year
MATCH (p)-[:HAS_TARGET_PAIR]->(tp:TargetPair)
RETURN a.name AS assignee, collect(DISTINCT tp.name)[0..10] AS target_pairs, count(DISTINCT tp) AS targetpair_count
ORDER BY targetpair_count DESC, assignee

examples: What target-pair combinations are associated with those 2024 new entrants?
For the companies entering in 2024, which target-pair combinations appear in their filings?
Which target-pair combinations were covered by those 2024 first-time entrants?
